item.title: Building the Perfect Place for the Next Chapter
item.description: Crafting a space designed for comfort, beauty, and new beginnings. How does this build set the stage for enjoying life’s next chapter?

media:content.media:title: Building the Perfect Place for the Next Chapter
media:content.media:description: Crafting a space designed for comfort, beauty, and new beginnings. How does this build set the stage for enjoying life’s next chapter?

item.title: Solo Carpentry Tricks You Can Do Alone
item.description: Working solo doesn’t mean slowing down. What clever carpentry tricks make heavy lifting, precise cuts, and assembly possible without an extra set of hands?

media:content.media:title: Solo Carpentry Tricks You Can Do Alone
media:content.media:description: Working solo doesn’t mean slowing down. What clever carpentry tricks make heavy lifting, precise cuts, and assembly possible without an extra set of hands?

item.title: Who Is the Best Carpenter on Site?
item.description: Find out who stands out as the best carpenter on site, showcasing skill and craftsmanship. Who will earn the title?

media:content.media:title: Who Is the Best Carpenter on Site?
media:content.media:description: Find out who stands out as the best carpenter on site, showcasing skill and craftsmanship. Who will earn the title?

item.title: Drywall and Painting: Building a Home
item.description: See the drywall and painting stages of home building, adding structure and finish. How does this step transform the space?

media:content.media:title: Drywall and Painting: Building a Home
media:content.media:description: See the drywall and painting stages of home building, adding structure and finish. How does this step transform the space?

item.title: Envision Outdoor Living at IBS
item.description: Visit Envision Outdoor Living at IBS, where their booth mirrors Mega Modern home decks. What innovations are on display?

item.title: Workshop Machine Trouble
item.description: Catch the moment when a workshop machine runs into a problem. How will the team fix it and keep the project moving?

item.title: Floor Joists Done Right
item.description: See the best way to lay out and install floor joists for strength and durability. How does this step support the build?

item.title: The 3 Magic Numbers for Laying Out Your House
item.description: Learn the three magic numbers that guide house layout for accuracy and balance. What makes these numbers so essential?

media:content.media:title: The 3 Magic Numbers for Laying Out Your House

item.title: Nantahala Build: Giant Roof Progress
item.description: Watch the giant roof come together in Nantahala #14, showcasing scale and teamwork. How will this roof crown the project?
